title: amaryllis × ackermannii
intro: Amaryllis × ackermannii, also known as the Belladonna Lily or Naked Lady, is a perennial bulbous plant that is a hybrid of the Amaryllis genus and a species of the Galtonia genus, characterized by its trumpet-shaped flowers and glossy green leaves. The plant contains alkaloids such as atropine, scopolamine, and hyoscyamine, which have medicinal properties, including analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Amaryllis × ackermannii include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and tinctures, are sometimes used in traditional medicine, although caution is advised due to the plant's toxic alkaloids and potential side effects.
